title: September 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 29''' is the 272nd day of the year (273rd in leap years). There are 93 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1975]] – [[Steve Yedlin]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 67|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 67]] published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales 1]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – [[Republic 69|''Republic'' 69]] published.
*2004 – ''[[Star Wars: Panel to Panel]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Interference]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 2]]'' published.
*2010 – [[Blood Ties 2|''Blood Ties'' 2]] published.
*2010 – [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (graphic novel)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II'' graphic novel]] published.
*2010 – [[Invasion: Rescues 4|''Invasion: Rescues'' 4]] published.
*[[2012]] – "[[Revival (episode)|Revival]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[Jedi Academy: Trilogy Box Set]]''published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Sutā Wōzu Fōsu No Kakusei No Nakamatachi 100]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 6]]'' published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (Screen Comix)|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' Screen Comix]] published.
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 17|''Star Wars'' (2020) 17]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle 2|''Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle'' 2]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 10|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 10]] published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Galaxy of Sounds]]'' premiered on [[Disney+]]
